projectDescription: A free Excel add-in (Relationship Visualizer) that transforms tabular spreadsheet data into professional Graphviz diagrams using a ribbon-based UI — no coding required.
keyFeatures: Generate Graphviz DOT diagrams directly from Excel data rows — no coding required
Ribbon-based UI with layout engine selection (dot, neato, fdp, sfdp, circo, twopi, osage, patchwork)
Built-in Style Designer for creating and saving reusable node, edge, and cluster styles
SQL data import from Excel workbooks and Access databases (Windows only)
Multiple graph layout directions and edge appearance (splines) options
Publish diagrams as SVG, PNG, PDF, BMP, GIF, JPG, PS, TIFF, or DOT files
SVG post-processing with find/replace for adding JavaScript animations and tooltips
JSON import/export for version control of workbook data and styles
Multilingual Ribbon interface: English (US/UK), French, German, Italian, Polish
Cross-platform: Windows (full) and macOS (core diagramming without SQL/Clipboard)
View/save the generated DOT source code with links to external Graphviz tools
Cluster nodes with nested subgraphs; split data into named views
publicApiSurface: data worksheet — Item, Related Item, Label, External Label, Tail Label, Head Label, Style Name, Attributes, Tooltip columns
styles worksheet — reusable named style definitions for nodes, edges, and clusters
sql worksheet — SQL SELECT statements to import/transform data from Excel workbooks or Access databases
svg worksheet — find/replace post-processing rules for SVG animation and customization
source worksheet — view and export generated DOT source code
Graphviz ribbon tab — layout engine, graph direction (rankdir), splines, automatic refresh, publish controls
SQL ribbon tab — Run SQL Commands, Filter, Data File, Connection Pool controls
Launchpad ribbon tab — language selection, metric/imperial units, worksheet visibility, settings
Exchange ribbon tab — JSON export/import of workbook data and styles
Style Designer worksheet — interactive GUI for composing Graphviz format strings
